concepts.title: Defining success metrics and north star
concepts.hook: Align metrics with business goals; avoid unintended consequences.

concepts.title: Actionable metrics vs vanity metrics
concepts.hook: Actionable: you can influence it and it correlates to business value.

concepts.title: Leading vs lagging indicators
concepts.hook: Leading (e.g., engagement) predicts lagging (e.g., retention); use for early signals.

concepts.title: Cohort analysis and retention curves
concepts.hook: Track user cohorts over time; detect user lifecycle patterns.

concepts.title: Cost-benefit analysis and ROI
concepts.hook: Tradeoff: cost of running experiment vs value of information.

concepts.title: Opportunity sizing
concepts.hook: How many users/dollars affected? Prioritize high-impact opportunities.

concepts.title: Stakeholder alignment and communication
concepts.hook: Frame results for product, engineering, and exec audiences differently.

concepts.title: Data-driven decision culture
concepts.hook: Testing and experimentation become operational norms.

concepts.title: Funnel analysis
concepts.hook: Track user drop-off at each step; identify bottlenecks.

concepts.title: Feature adoption and engagement metrics
concepts.hook: DAU, MAU, feature-level engagement guide product roadmap.

concepts.title: Network effects and viral loops
concepts.hook: Measure how users drive adoption of other users.
